name: Sour Cream Banana Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter with the sugar until smooth.
2. Add the eggs and vanilla extract, mixing well after each addition.
3. Gradually add the dry ingredients (flour, baking soda, and salt), stirring until combined.
4. Mix in the mashed bananas, chopped nuts, and sour cream until just incorporated.
5. Pour the batter into a greased loaf pan.
6. Bake at 350°F for 1 hour, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
